name: management-world-skills
description: Agent skill stack for submitting to 《管理世界》 (Management World), the top management and applied-economics journal in China. Covers China-context topic selection, institutional-background framing, quasi-experimental identification suited to Chinese policy shocks, mechanism / heterogeneity analysis, CSSCI-grade tables, policy-implication writing, journal house style, and R&R response letters. Bilingual zh-CN / en docs; Stata / R / Python templates.
